case_title: TAPIA, SANTOS DBA SANTOS SERVICE CO. VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-17-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH RILES. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. REQUEST IS GRANTED. -PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD-

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT(PG&E) TO NOV-17-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAPIA, SANTOS DBA SANTOS SERVICE CO.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAPIA, SANTOS DBA SANTOS SERVICE CO.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAPIA, SANTOS DBA SANTOS SERVICE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY $4,203.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,203.50, DEFENDANT'S AGREEMENT STATES THAT IT WILL REIMBURSE FOR THE PURCHASE PRICE AND MATERIALS AND LABOR ONCE IT RECEIVED A COMPLETED APPLICATION. PLAINTIFF'S ADDITIONAL INVOICES WERE SUBMITTED WITHIN THE REQUIRED TIME PERIOD AND NOTHING IN DEFENDANT'S MATERIALS INDICATED THEY COULD NOT BE SUBMITTED AS SUCH. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED ADDITIONAL REBATES FOR ALL APPLICATIONS AND INVOICES SUBMITTED IN REQUISITE TIME PERIOD LESS OVER PAYMENT WHERE NO SUCH DOCUMENTATION WAS PROVIDED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TAPIA, SANTOS DBA SANTOS SERVICE CO.
